items.label: Delivery Model
items.desc: How and where the service is physically delivered

items.label: Support Hours
items.desc: Window during which the team actively handles tickets

items.label: Language of Support
items.desc: Language(s) used for all support communications

items.label: Time Zone Anchor
items.desc: Primary timezone for SLA clock measurement

items.label: Public Holiday Coverage
items.desc: Coverage model during regional public holidays

items.label: Email / ITSM Ticketing
items.desc: Primary ticket creation channel - always required

items.label: Voice / Phone Channel
items.desc: Inbound voice support and IVR routing

items.label: On-Call / Alerting Platform
items.desc: Tool managing P1 after-hours escalations

items.label: Self-Service Portal
items.desc: Customer-facing portal for ticket logging and KB

items.label: Chat / Collaboration Channel
items.desc: Real-time L1 triage channel per customer

items.label: Number of Support Towers
items.desc: Service towers required for this product

items.label: Support Tiers Required
items.desc: Minimum tiered support structure

items.label: P1 On-Call Structure
items.desc: Who is engaged for P1 after-hours incidents

items.label: Service Manager Model
items.desc: Account management and service ownership model

items.label: Service Delivery Lead (SDM)
items.desc: Named SDM owning SLA performance and governance

items.label: Arabic-Speaking Resource
items.desc: Language-specific staffing requirement

items.label: ITSM Platform
items.desc: System of record for incidents, requests and SLAs

items.label: DevOps / CI-CD Tooling
items.desc: Pipeline and release management toolchain

items.label: Observability & Monitoring
items.desc: Proactive monitoring, alerting and log analytics

items.label: Security Stack
items.desc: SOC/SIEM, compliance certifications, pen testing

items.label: Backup & DR Platform
items.desc: Data protection and disaster recovery tooling

items.label: Knowledge Management
items.desc: KB and runbook library for known issues

items.label: P1 Response Target
items.desc: Time from ticket creation to first human response

items.label: P1 Resolution Target
items.desc: Time from ticket creation to service restoration

items.label: P2 Response Target
items.desc: Response time for High priority incidents

items.label: P2 Resolution Target
items.desc: Resolution time for High priority incidents

items.label: P3 Response Target
items.desc: Response time for Medium priority issues

items.label: P4 Response Target
items.desc: Response time for Low / service requests

items.label: VIP / Priority Tier
items.desc: Enhanced SLA tier for strategic accounts

items.label: Uptime Commitment
items.desc: Monthly availability target for the service

items.label: Incident Management
items.desc: End-to-end incident lifecycle framework

items.label: RCA / Problem Management
items.desc: When root cause analysis is triggered

items.label: Change Management
items.desc: Governance process for production changes

items.label: Request Fulfilment
items.desc: Standard service request handling via catalogue

items.label: Major Incident Management
items.desc: MIM process for P1 critical events + PIR

items.label: Pricing Model
items.desc: How the service fee is calculated and charged

items.label: Billing Currency
items.desc: Currency for invoicing and contracts

items.label: Billing Frequency
items.desc: How often invoices are issued to the customer

items.label: Target Gross Margin
items.desc: Commercial margin target for this product

items.label: Cost Review Cadence
items.desc: How often actuals are reconciled against the model

items.label: Service Report Frequency
items.desc: How often the SLA and volume report is delivered

items.label: Operational Review Cadence
items.desc: Internal operational review frequency

items.label: Business Review (QBR) Cadence
items.desc: Customer-facing strategic review frequency

items.label: Compliance Requirements
items.desc: Regulatory or certification requirements

items.label: KPI Set
items.desc: Performance metrics tracked and reported

items.label: Escalation Reporting
items.desc: When and how leadership is notified of breaches
